title: What can I do for you? — новые слова

items.example: Could you do me a favour and carry this bag?
Could you lend me a hand with the boxes?
She made an effort to arrive on time.
He took a risk by investing in the new project.
I need to make a decision by tomorrow.
He told a lie to avoid getting into trouble.
You should always tell the truth.
Have a guess how much this costs.
Can you give me a hand with the luggage?
